Operation 'getpoi' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain the 21 parameters or their purpose. Added context about filtering capabilities, return structure (ChargePoint objects), and use case to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented and specific about the search functionality.

data.current_description: Returns a list of EV charging station points of interest matching the given criteria.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for EV charging points by location and filters
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of EV charging station points of interest (POI) matching the specified search criteria. Supports filtering by location (latitude/longitude), distance radius, operator, connection type, and other parameters. Returns an array of ChargePoint objects containing detailed information about each charging location including address, connections, and operational status. Useful for finding available charging stations near a specific location.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't explain the 21 parameters or their purpose. Added context about filtering capabilities, return structure (ChargePoint objects), and use case to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented and specific about the search functionality.

message: Operation 'getreferencedata' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description uses vague language ('etc.') and doesn't explain the structure of returned data or the purpose of reference data in the API context. Added clarity about the ReferenceData schema structure, use cases (caching, filtering), and the language parameter. Enhanced summary to be more specific about the domain context and utility of this operation for AI agents.

data.current_description: Returns all reference data including connection types, countries, operators, status types, etc.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve reference data for charging infrastructure
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive reference data required for working with the Open Charge Map API. Returns a ReferenceData object containing lookup tables and enumeration values including connection types (e.g., Type 2, CCS), countries, operators, charging status types, and other metadata. This data is typically cached client-side and used to interpret and filter POI queries. Supports optional language parameter for localized reference data.
data.reasoning: Original description uses vague language ('etc.') and doesn't explain the structure of returned data or the purpose of reference data in the API context. Added clarity about the ReferenceData schema structure, use cases (caching, filtering), and the language parameter. Enhanced summary to be more specific about the domain context and utility of this operation for AI agents.
